---
title: "Base Rの作図"
# Purpose: Teach simple Base R plotting for plant growth data in Japanese.
---

{{< include ../_extensions/r-wasm/live/_knitr.qmd >}}

<!-- Purpose: This lesson shows quick visual checks with Base R plotting functions. -->

Base Rの作図関数は、データを素早く確認したいときに便利です。追加パッケージを
使わなくても、散布図、箱ひげ図、簡単な傾向線を描けます。

## 散布図

```{webr}
#| autorun: true
plants <- read.csv("data/plant_growth.csv")

# 日本語フォント環境に左右されにくいよう、図中ラベルは英語にしています。
treatment_id <- as.integer(factor(plants$treatment))
plot(
  plants$day,
  plants$height_cm,
  pch = 19,
  col = treatment_id,
  xlab = "Day",
  ylab = "Height (cm)",
  main = "Plant height through time"
)
legend(
  "topleft",
  legend = levels(factor(plants$treatment)),
  col = seq_along(levels(factor(plants$treatment))),
  pch = 19,
  bty = "n"
)
```

## 箱ひげ図

```{webr}
plants <- read.csv("data/plant_growth.csv")

boxplot(
  height_cm ~ treatment,
  data = plants,
  xlab = "Treatment",
  ylab = "Height (cm)",
  main = "Height by treatment"
)
```

## 簡単な傾向線を追加する

```{webr}
plants <- read.csv("data/plant_growth.csv")

plot(
  plants$day,
  plants$height_cm,
  pch = 19,
  xlab = "Day",
  ylab = "Height (cm)",
  main = "Overall growth trend"
)
abline(lm(height_cm ~ day, data = plants), col = "blue", lwd = 2)
```
